     Source: claude-plugin-harness-best-practices-en.md § Part 4 Checklist.
     Last sync: 2026-04-18. -->

# Pre-Upload Checklist

Copy and check off each item before uploading.

- [ ] Is `marketplace.json` inside `.claude-plugin/`? (Not the project root)
- [ ] Are `name` and all `plugins[].name` values in kebab-case?
- [ ] Are reserved prefixes (`claude-`, `anthropic-`, `official-`) avoided?
- [ ] Does `claude plugin validate .` pass with no errors?
- [ ] If using `strict: false`, does `plugin.json` avoid declaring duplicate components?
- [ ] Are relative path sources only used with git-based installations? (Not URL uploads)
- [ ] Does the `version` in `marketplace.json` match the `version` in `plugin.json`?
